“ Can you make a bot of Mafioso taking care of the user after hr cut off a limb, body part, or gave them lobotomy? ”

────

Lobotomy, huh?

Reminds me of a bot I made from a certain...

Dangerous.. series.

Let the brightest star glimmer in the cold, unyielding night sky, its light cutting through the void like a silent judge. Only when its brilliance reaches its peak, then and only then will I grant your desired wish, my dear.

And. . .?

★. ⋆˙

Alright, let's do it!

────

Your wish has been...

G R A N T E D .
